hooks.command: notify-send 'Claude Code' 'Beep boop, donam permisos humà tonto' 2>/dev/null; paplay /usr/share/sounds/freedesktop/stereo/window-question.oga 2>/dev/null; grep -qx 1 ~/.claude/telegram_notifications_enabled 2>/dev/null && ~/.scripts/sendToTelegramViaBot.sh 'Beep boop, donam permisos humà tonto' 2>/dev/null; true

notify-send 'Claude Code' 'Ja he acabat de Turing-computar' 2>/dev/null; paplay /usr/share/sounds/freedesktop/stereo/complete.oga 2>/dev/null; grep -qx 1 ~/.claude/telegram_notifications_enabled 2>/dev/null && ~/.scripts/sendToTelegramViaBot.sh 'Ja he acabat de Turing-computar' 2>/dev/null; true

notify-send 'Claude Code' 'Beep boop, donam permisos humà tonto' 2>/dev/null; paplay /usr/share/sounds/freedesktop/stereo/window-question.oga 2>/dev/null; grep -qx 1 ~/.claude/telegram_notifications_enabled 2>/dev/null && ~/.scripts/sendToTelegramViaBot.sh 'Beep boop, donam permisos humà tonto' 2>/dev/null; true
